attempts.test_code:
import threading
from source import bitcount


def test_bitcount_terminates_and_returns_correct_count():
    result = []

    def run():
        result.append(bitcount(127))

    t = threading.Thread(target=run, daemon=True)
    t.start()
    t.join(timeout=2)

    assert not t.is_alive(), (
        "bitcount(127) did not terminate within 2 seconds — "
        "infinite loop caused by XOR instead of AND on lowest set bit"
    )
    assert result[0] == 7, (
        f"bitcount(127) returned {result[0]} but expected 7 "
        f"(127 = 0b1111111 has 7 set bits)"
    )
